content:
Delighted to share that I secured a place in the Top 20 in the Online Quiz Competition on the Indian Contract Act, 1872, organized by Yours In Law on 12 July 2026, with a score of 34/35.

This competition provided an excellent 
opportunity to assess my understanding of the fundamental principles of contract law while competing with law students from diverse academic backgrounds. Being featured on the leaderboard is an encouraging milestone that reflects the importance of consistent learning, conceptual clarity, and disciplined preparation.

I sincerely appreciate Yours In Law for organizing such an engaging initiative that promotes legal awareness and academic excellence among aspiring legal professionals.

Looking forward to participating in more such competitions and continuing to strengthen my legal knowledge.
